G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : ∀ (h : tail✝ ≠ []), tail✝.last h ∈ tail✝
⊢ ∀ (h : head✝ :: tail✝ ≠ []), (head✝ :: tail✝).last h ∈ head✝ :: tail✝

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : ∀ (h : tail ≠ []), tail.last h ∈ tail
⊢ ∀ (h : head :: tail ≠ []), (head :: tail).last h ∈ head :: tail

G2.label:
case h
α : Type u_1
head : α
tail : List α
h : head :: tail ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬tail = []), tail.last h ∈ tail
⊢ (head :: tail).last h = head

G8.label:
case h.nil
α : Type u_1
head : α
h : [head] ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬[] = []), [].last h ∈ []
⊢ [head].last h = head

G9.label:
case h.cons
α : Type u_1
head head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
h : head :: head_1 :: tail_1 ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬head_1 :: tail_1 = []), (head_1 :: tail_1).last h ∈ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ (head :: head_1 :: tail_1).last h = head

G3.label:
case h
α : Type u_1
head : α
tail : List α
h : head :: tail ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬tail = []), tail.last h ∈ tail
⊢ (head :: tail).last h ∈ tail

G6.label:
case h.nil
α : Type u_1
head : α
h : [head] ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬[] = []), [].last h ∈ []
⊢ [head].last h ∈ []

G7.label:
case h.cons
α : Type u_1
head head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
h : head :: head_1 :: tail_1 ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬head_1 :: tail_1 = []), (head_1 :: tail_1).last h ∈ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ (head :: head_1 :: tail_1).last h ∈ head_1 :: tail_1

G4.label:
case nil
α : Type u_1
head : α
h : [head] ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬[] = []), [].last h ∈ []
⊢ [head].last h = head ∨ [head].last h ∈ []

G5.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
head head_1 : α
tail_1 : List α
h : head :: head_1 :: tail_1 ≠ []
tail_ih : ∀ (h : ¬head_1 :: tail_1 = []), (head_1 :: tail_1).last h ∈ head_1 :: tail_1
⊢ (head :: head_1 :: tail_1).last h = head ∨ (head :: head_1 :: tail_1).last h ∈ head_1 :: tail_1
